tests.name: plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged deduplicates additional file paths returned by matching plugins
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged matches wildcard plugins and file extensions case-insensitively while skipping non-matching files
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged requests a full refresh when a matching plugin only exposes pre-analysis hooks
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged does not request a refresh when a matching plugin has neither change nor pre-analysis hooks
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged continues after plugin change-hook failures and requests a full refresh
graphView/files/navigation shows a mock-file message when no workspace folder exists
graphView/files/navigation opens an existing file and tracks the visit count
graphView/files/navigation uses the default editor behavior when none is provided
graphView/files/navigation falls back to a mock-file message when the file is missing from disk
graphView/files/navigation shows an error when opening the file fails
graphView/files/navigation reveals the file in the explorer when a workspace exists
graphView/files/navigation does not reveal the file in the explorer when no workspace exists
graphView/files/navigation copies the absolute path when requested
graphView/files/navigation copies the provided text when no absolute-path prefix is used
graphView/files/navigation keeps the original absolute-path marker when no workspace exists
pipeline/analysis/analyze returns an empty graph when no workspace root is available
pipeline/analysis/analyze uses only default and plugin filters when user filters are omitted
pipeline/analysis/analyze discovers, analyzes, caches, and emits lifecycle events
pipeline/analysis/analyze shows the discovery warning when the file limit is reached
pipeline/analysis/run delegates analysis through the shared runner with workspace defaults
pipeline/analysis/run passes empty user filters and disabled sets when they are omitted
gitHistory/files reads and filters commit tree file output
gitHistory/files throws an abort error before reading tree files when the signal is already aborted
gitHistory/files requests diff name-status output and file content at a commit
gitHistory/files returns an empty string when reading a file at a commit fails
gitHistory/files throws an abort error before reading diff output when the signal is already aborted
graphView/files/actions runs the delete action after confirmation
graphView/files/actions skips the delete action when confirmation is rejected
graphView/files/actions returns before prompting when no workspace folder is available for delete
graphView/files/actions creates the file selected in the input box
graphView/files/actions shows an error when creating the file fails
graphView/files/actions creates files in the workspace root without prefixing the current directory
graphView/files/actions returns before prompting when no workspace folder is available for create
graphView/files/actions returns when the create prompt is cancelled
graphView/files/actions stringifies non-error create failures
graphView/files/actions delegates exclude additions to the undoable action runner
pipeline/analysis/files logs cache hit and miss counts from workspace file analysis
pipeline/analysis/files creates source-backed adapters for file analysis and event emission
pipeline/analysis/files falls back to an empty relation set when the registry returns no analysis result
graph view file-info message helper sends FILE_INFO when the loader returns a payload
graph view file-info message helper skips messaging when the loader returns no payload
graph view file-info message helper logs failures without rethrowing
graphView/files/visits/tracking reads visit counts from persisted state
graphView/files/visits/tracking increments visit counts and forwards the update message
graphView/files/visits/tracking tracks only files that exist in the current graph
graphView/files/rename does nothing when no workspace folder is available
graphView/files/rename renames the file selected in the input box
graphView/files/rename selects the full hidden filename when there is no extension suffix to preserve
graphView/files/rename does not rename when the user keeps the original name
graphView/files/rename shows an error when the rename action fails
graph view file-info request helper initializes the analyzer on demand before loading and sending file info
graph view file-info request helper returns undefined analyzer state without trying to initialize it
graph view file-info request helper reuses an initialized analyzer without running initialize again
graphView/files/visits/storage returns the persisted visits storage key
graphView/files/visits/storage returns zero when no persisted visit count exists
graphView/files/visits/storage returns the stored visit count for a file
graphView/files/visits/storage increments persisted visit counts and returns the matching webview update
graphView/files/visits/storage starts visit counts from one when no persisted state exists
graphViewFileInfo builds file info payloads with incoming and outgoing counts
graphViewFileInfo builds file info payloads with zero counts when no edges match
pipeline/analysis/state returns an empty graph when rebuilding without cached file connections
pipeline/analysis/state prefers rebuilding from cached file analysis when it is available
pipeline/analysis/state reads rebuild dependencies from the source state
pipeline/analysis/state creates and persists an empty analysis cache
graphView/files/info/loader returns no payload when no workspace folder is available
graphView/files/info/loader builds file info payloads from stat, analyzer, graph, and visit state
graphView/files/info/loader builds file info payloads without a plugin when the analyzer is unavailable

graphView/files/visits/counts returns the persisted visit count for a file
graphView/files/visits/counts increments visit counts for new files
graphView/files/visits/counts increments visit counts for previously visited files
pipeline/analysis/preAnalyze reads duplicate relative paths only once before notifying plugins
